summary: Iteration 41: Table Management & Waiter Ordering System - All 19 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend Table Management page and Waiter Mode verified working with all features functional.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/tables/sections returns 200 with list of sections
Backend: POST /api/tables/sections creates a new section
Backend: GET /api/tables returns 200 with list of tables
Backend: GET /api/tables/stats returns table statistics (total, available, occupied, etc.)
Backend: POST /api/tables creates a new table
Backend: PUT /api/tables/{id} updates table details
Backend: POST /api/tables/{id}/status updates table status (reserved, cleaning, etc.)
Backend: POST /api/tables/{table_id}/start-order creates an order and marks table as occupied
Backend: POST /api/tables/{table_id}/add-items adds items to table order and sends to kitchen
Backend: POST /api/tables/{table_id}/close-order closes and pays for table order
Backend: POST /api/tables/{table_id}/mark-available marks table as available after cleaning
Backend: POST /api/cashier/login with PIN 1234 returns access token
Backend: GET /api/waiters returns list of waiters with active tables count
Frontend: /table-management loads with sidebar, stats cards, section tabs, tables grid
Frontend: Add Table dialog works with table number, section, capacity, shape fields
Frontend: Add Section dialog works with name, color, floor fields
Frontend: /waiter PIN login screen with number keypad works
Frontend: Waiter PIN login with PIN 1234 navigates to tables view with toast
Frontend: Waiter tables view shows all tables with status colors and section tabs
Frontend: Clicking available table opens order view with menu items and categories
Frontend: Adding items to cart and sending to kitchen works
Frontend: Cart shows items with modifiers, VAT calculation, and total
bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent: Fixed MongoDB ObjectId serialization error in POST /api/tables (table_dict.pop('_id', None))
Fixed MongoDB ObjectId error in POST /api/tables/sections (section_dict.pop('_id', None))
Fixed MongoDB ObjectId error in POST /api/waiters (waiter.pop('_id', None))
Fixed MongoDB ObjectId error in POST /api/tables/{id}/start-order (order.pop('_id', None))
Fixed MongoDB ObjectId error when returning existing order in start-order (added {'_id': 0} projection)
Fixed MongoDB ObjectId error in POST /api/tables/{id}/add-items (added {'_id': 0} projection)
Fixed MongoDB ObjectId error in POST /api/tables/{id}/close-order (added {'_id': 0} projection)
critical_code_review_comments: Tables router (/app/backend/routers/tables.py): All insert_one operations now properly exclude MongoDB's _id field from responses
Tables router: All find_one operations use {'_id': 0} projection to exclude ObjectId from responses
Table Management page: Has all required data-testid attributes for testing
Waiter page: Uses localStorage for waiter_token and waiter_user (separate from cashier)
Waiter page: Uses /api/cashier/login for PIN authentication (shares auth with cashier)
Order flow properly: start-order -> add-items (sends to kitchen) -> close-order (creates sale, sets table to cleaning)
15% VAT calculation correctly applied in order totals
seed_data_creation: Tables T1-T5 in Main Hall section (pre-existing). Sections: Main Hall, Outdoor, VIP Room (auto-created on first GET).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 41 tested Table Management & Waiter Ordering System. Backend APIs: GET/POST/PUT/DELETE for tables and sections, table status updates, full order flow (start-order, add-items, close-order, mark-available). Frontend: /table-management page (admin) with stats, section tabs, tables grid, add/edit dialogs. /waiter page with PIN login (uses cashier/login endpoint), tables selection view, order view with menu items, modifiers dialog, cart with VAT, send to kitchen, payment dialog. All MongoDB ObjectId serialization issues were fixed by adding {'_id': 0} projections and .pop('_id', None) after insert_one operations. Tables T1-T5 exist in Main Hall section. Waiter uses same PIN as cashier (1234).
